disambiguated.context: Technology is advancing with a startling pace, and some people have trouble keeping up with the most modern aspects. A recent interview with a high school student and an older adult aimed to get at just this issue. Only one of the two had difficulties, though. The high school student found that they actually enjoyed adapting to the newest gadget, and it was only the older adult who found the whole processing too exhausting, and kind of gave up completely already.
disambiguated.question: Who is out of touch with modern times?

The context explicitly states the older adult found adapting to new technology exhausting and gave up, while the student enjoyed it. This is sufficient to determine the older adult is out of touch.
